text: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables computer systems to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.
Deep learning utilizes artificial neural networks with multiple layers to process data and make predictions based on learned representations.
Natural language processing is a branch of AI that focuses on enabling computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language.
The transformer architecture has revolutionized the field of machine learning by introducing the self-attention mechanism for parallel processing.

content: Supervised learning requires labeled training data where both input features and target outputs are provided to train the model.
Unsupervised learning discovers hidden patterns in unlabeled data without explicit target variables to guide the learning process.

data: Reinforcement learning enables agents to learn optimal behaviors through interaction with an environment and reward signals.

message: Transfer learning leverages pre-trained models to accelerate learning on new tasks with limited labeled data.
